jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Navin's - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navin's. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Property Consultant to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Navin's:
Navin's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navin's!
